package.name: rl_infer_cpp
package.description: C++ port of the rl_infer JAX/NumPy inference nodes (hover_jax_node, gate_jax_node). Pure Eigen MLP forward pass loading .npw weight files exported from the deploy .pkl checkpoints by rl_infer/scripts/export_policy_cpp.py. No Python, jax, flax or numpy at runtime — built for the Jetson Orin (ROS 2 Foxy) and x86 SITL (Humble).
